parameters.formDescription: One step. Enter the WhatsApp number that should receive the daily summaries, then Submit. This creates the database and registers ALL your WhatsApp groups to be summarized every night at 23:00. You can fine-tune later with the "Manage Groups (Advanced)" workflow.

values.placeholder: leave blank if GOWA_BASE_URL is set on n8n
leave blank if GOWA_DEVICE_ID is set — find it via GET /app/devices

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wag_groups (
    chat_jid     TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    project_name TEXT        NOT NULL,
    send_to      TEXT        NOT NULL,
    active       BOOLEAN     NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wag_messages (
    id          BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    message_id  TEXT        UNIQUE,
    chat_jid    TEXT        NOT NULL,
    sender_jid  TEXT,
    sender_name TEXT,
    message     TEXT,
    media_type  TEXT,
    is_group    BOOLEAN     NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
    "timestamp" TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    raw         TEXT
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_wag_messages_chat_time ON wag_messages (chat_jid, "timestamp");
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wag_summaries (
    id            BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    chat_jid      TEXT        NOT NULL,
    summary_date  DATE        NOT NULL,
    message_count INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    member_count  INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    status        TEXT        NOT NULL,
    summary_text  TEXT,
    created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    UNIQUE (chat_jid, summary_date)
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS wag_config (
    key   TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    value TEXT
);

INSERT INTO wag_config (key, value) VALUES ('gowa_base_url', $1), ('gowa_device_id', $2), ('alert_to', $3)
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ ($('Quick Setup Form').item.json['go-wa URL (optional)'] || ''), ($('Quick Setup Form').item.json['go-wa device id'] || ''), ($('Quick Setup Form').item.json['Summary recipient number'] || '') ] }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wag_groups (chat_jid, project_name, send_to, active)
VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4)
ON CONFLICT (chat_jid) DO UPDATE SET
  project_name = EXCLUDED.project_name,
  send_to = EXCLUDED.send_to,
  active = EXCLUDED.active
